author: Toei Animation
text:
Luffy Defeats Enel l ONE PIECE l Episode 192
22 years ago today, Monkey D. Luffy defeated Enel and rang the golden bell 🔔

“DON’T MESS WITH ME, EARLOBES!!!
UNTIL THE BELL RINGS!!!”

GUM-GUM… ROCKET!!
GOLD RIFLE!! 💥

Like & share if you remember witnessing this legendary moment ☁️🏴‍☠️

☑️ Subscribe to Toei Animation on Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@ToeiAnimationOfficial

👍 If you liked this video, make sure to hit a LIKE on this page.

author: Toei Animation
text:
Happy Mother’s Day from the world of ONE PIECE 🏴‍☠️✨
For all the moms who carry love through every storm 💐❤️
Robin’s story reminds us that a mother’s love never truly disappears.

Happy Mother’s Day from the world of ONE PIECE 🏴‍☠️✨
